---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(data.table)

setwd("/Users/mnyamari/Desktop/GTEx/variance-decomp")

metadata <- read.csv("Metadata_full.csv")
colnames(metadata)
nrow(metadata)

# Clean column names
colnames(metadata) <- gsub(" ", "_", colnames(metadata)) 
colnames(metadata) <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_]", "", colnames(metadata)) 
colnames(metadata) <- tolower(colnames(metadata)) 

colnames(metadata)

# extract side 
metadata$side <- NA

if ("anatomicalentityauthorannotation" %in% colnames(metadata)) {
  metadata$side[grepl("left", metadata$anatomicalentityauthorannotation, ignore.case = TRUE)] <- "L"
  metadata$side[grepl("right", metadata$anatomicalentityauthorannotation, ignore.case = TRUE)] <- "R"
}

if ("anatomicalentityname" %in% colnames(metadata)) {
  na_indices <- is.na(metadata$side)
  metadata$side[na_indices & grepl("left", metadata$anatomicalentityname, ignore.case = TRUE)] <- "L"
  metadata$side[na_indices & grepl("right", metadata$anatomicalentityname, ignore.case = TRUE)] <- "R"
}

if ("expressionmappedanatomicalentity_name" %in% colnames(metadata)) {
  na_indices <- is.na(metadata$side)
  metadata$side[na_indices & grepl("left", metadata$expressionmappedanatomicalentityname, ignore.case = TRUE)] <- "L"
  metadata$side[na_indices & grepl("right", metadata$expressionmappedanatomicalentityname, ignore.case = TRUE)] <- "R"
}

table(metadata$side, useNA = "ifany")
table(metadata$species, metadata$side, useNA = "ifany")

# Create normalized organ column
metadata$organ_normalized <- metadata$anatomicalentityname

# Remove left/right patterns
metadata$organ_normalized <- gsub("left ", "", metadata$organ_normalized, ignore.case = TRUE)
metadata$organ_normalized <- gsub("right ", "", metadata$organ_normalized, ignore.case = TRUE)
metadata$organ_normalized <- gsub(" left", "", metadata$organ_normalized, ignore.case = TRUE)
metadata$organ_normalized <- gsub(" right", "", metadata$organ_normalized, ignore.case = TRUE)
metadata$organ_normalized <- trimws(metadata$organ_normalized)

write.csv(metadata, "metadata_clean.csv", row.names = FALSE)

metadata$organ <- metadata$organ_normalized

sample_counts <- metadata %>%
  group_by(species, organ, side) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")
print(sample_counts)

```


```{r}

# Get sample IDs from metadata
sample_ids <- metadata$libraryid

kallisto_dir <- "/Users/mnyamari/Desktop/GTEx/kallisto_out"
missing_files <- c()

for (id in sample_ids) {
  abundance_file <- file.path(kallisto_dir, id, "abundance.tsv")
  if (!file.exists(abundance_file)) {
    missing_files <- c(missing_files, id)
  }
}

length(missing_files)

```


```{r age and sex}

if ("stageauthorannotation" %in% colnames(metadata)) {
  print(summary(metadata$stageauthorannotation))
} 

print(unique(metadata$stageauthorannotation))

# Extract numeric age and convert to a consistent unit
extract_age <- function(age_string) {
  if (is.na(age_string) || age_string == "") return(NA)
  
  # Extract numbers
  numbers <- as.numeric(unlist(regmatches(age_string, gregexpr("[0-9]+", age_string))))
  
  if (length(numbers) == 0) return(NA)
  
  # Take midpoint if range, otherwise take the single value
  age_value <- if (length(numbers) == 2) mean(numbers) else numbers[1]
  
  # Convert to weeks
  if (grepl("week", age_string, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    return(age_value)
  } else if (grepl("month", age_string, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    return(age_value * 4.3) 
  } else if (grepl("year", age_string, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    return(age_value * 52) 
  } else if (grepl("day", age_string, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    return(age_value / 7) 
  } else {
    return(age_value)
  }
}

# Apply to all samples
metadata$age_weeks <- sapply(metadata$stageauthorannotation, extract_age)
summary(metadata$age_weeks)

# age by species
age_summary <- metadata %>%
  group_by(species) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    min_age = min(age_weeks, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_age = max(age_weeks, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_age = mean(age_weeks, na.rm = TRUE),
    has_age = sum(!is.na(age_weeks))
  )

print(age_summary)

# Save
write.csv(metadata, "metadata_clean.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}
library(tximport)
library(biomaRt)
library(dplyr)

kallisto_dir <- "/Users/mnyamari/Desktop/GTEx/kallisto_out"

# Get sample IDs from metadata
sample_ids <- metadata$libraryid

# file paths
abundance_files <- file.path(kallisto_dir, sample_ids, "abundance.tsv")
names(abundance_files) <- sample_ids
missing <- abundance_files[!file.exists(abundance_files)]

create_tx2gene <- function(species_name) {
  
  # Map species names to Ensembl dataset names
  dataset_map <- c(
    "Mus_musculus" = "mmusculus_gene_ensembl",
    "Sus_scrofa" = "sscrofa_gene_ensembl",
    "Ovis_aries" = "oaries_gene_ensembl"
  )
  
  dataset <- dataset_map[species_name]
  
  if (is.na(dataset)) {
    stop("Unknown species: ", species_name)
  }
  
  # Connect to Ensembl
  ensembl <- useEnsembl(biomart = "genes", dataset = dataset)
  
  # Get transcript to gene mapping
  tx2gene <- getBM(
    attributes = c("ensembl_transcript_id", "ensembl_gene_id"),
    mart = ensembl
  )
  
  colnames(tx2gene) <- c("transcript_id", "gene_id")
  
  cat("  Retrieved", nrow(tx2gene), "transcript-gene mappings\n")
  
  return(tx2gene)
}

# Create tx2gene for each species
tx2gene_mouse <- create_tx2gene("Mus_musculus")
tx2gene_pig <- create_tx2gene("Sus_scrofa")
#tx2gene_sheep <- create_tx2gene("Ovis_aries")

tx2gene_mouse$transcript_id <- sub("\\..*", "", tx2gene_mouse$transcript_id)
tx2gene_pig$transcript_id <- sub("\\..*", "", tx2gene_pig$transcript_id)
#tx2gene_sheep$transcript_id <- sub("\\..*", "", tx2gene_sheep$transcript_id)

saveRDS(tx2gene_mouse, "tx2gene_mouse.rds")
saveRDS(tx2gene_pig, "tx2gene_pig.rds")
#saveRDS(tx2gene_sheep, "tx2gene_sheep.rds")

```


```{r Import with tximport}

# tx2gene_mouse <- readRDS("/Users/mnyamari/Desktop/GTEx/variance-decomp/tx2gene_mouse.rds")
# tx2gene_pig <- readRDS("/Users/mnyamari/Desktop/GTEx/variance-decomp/tx2gene_pig.rds")
# tx2gene_sheep <- readRDS("/Users/mnyamari/Desktop/GTEx/variance-decomp/tx2gene_sheep.rds")

import_species <- function(species_name, tx2gene, metadata, files) {
  
  # Get samples for this species
  species_samples <- metadata$libraryid[metadata$species == species_name]
  species_files <- files[species_samples]
  
  cat(length(species_files))
  
  # Import
  txi <- tximport(
    files = species_files,
    type = "kallisto",
    tx2gene = tx2gene,
    countsFromAbundance = "no",
    ignoreTxVersion = TRUE
  )
  
  cat(nrow(txi$counts))
  
  return(txi)
}

txi_mouse <- import_species("Mus_musculus", tx2gene_mouse, metadata, abundance_files)
txi_pig <- import_species("Sus_scrofa", tx2gene_pig, metadata, abundance_files)
# txi_sheep <- import_species("Ovis_aries", tx2gene_sheep, metadata, abundance_files)

saveRDS(txi_mouse, "txi_mouse.rds")
saveRDS(txi_pig, "txi_pig.rds")
# saveRDS(txi_sheep, "txi_sheep.rds")

```

```{r sheep older version}

# library(rtracklayer)
# library(dplyr)
# 
# gtf <- import("/Users/mnyamari/Downloads/ncbi_dataset/ncbi_dataset/data/GCF_000298735.1/Ovis_aries.Oar_v3.1.89.gtf.gz")
# gtf_df <- as.data.frame(gtf)
# 
# tx2gene_sheep <- gtf_df %>%
#   filter(type == "transcript") %>%
#   dplyr::select(transcript_id, gene_id) %>%
#   distinct()
# 
# tx2gene_sheep$transcript_id <- sub("\\..*", "", tx2gene_sheep$transcript_id)
# tx2gene_sheep$gene_id <- sub("\\..*", "", tx2gene_sheep$gene_id)
# 
# head(tx2gene_sheep)
# nrow(tx2gene_sheep)
# 
# saveRDS(tx2gene_sheep, "tx2gene_sheep_oar3.rds")
# 
# txi_sheep <- import_species("Ovis_aries", tx2gene_sheep, metadata, abundance_files)
# 
# saveRDS(txi_sheep, "txi_sheep.rds")

```



```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(dplyr)

check_covariates <- function(meta, species_name) {
  meta_sp <- meta %>% filter(species == species_name)
  
  # Sex: at least 2 levels with >=3 samples each
  sex_counts <- table(meta_sp$sex)
  use_sex <- length(sex_counts) >= 2 && all(sex_counts >= 3)
  
  # Age: continuous
  age_vals <- meta_sp$age_weeks[!is.na(meta_sp$age_weeks)]
  use_age  <- length(age_vals) >= 10 && 
              length(unique(age_vals)) >= 5
  
  return(list(use_sex = use_sex, use_age = use_age))
}

mouse_cov <- check_covariates(metadata, "Mus_musculus")
#sheep_cov <- check_covariates(metadata, "Ovis_aries")
pig_cov   <- check_covariates(metadata, "Sus_scrofa")

```


```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(dplyr)

# metadata
# clean and convert
metadata$sex       <- as.factor(metadata$sex)
metadata$side      <- as.factor(metadata$side)
metadata$age_weeks <- scale(as.numeric(metadata$age_weeks))
metadata$maxreadlength <- as.factor(metadata$maxreadlength)

prepare_metadata <- function(metadata, species_name) {
  
  # Filter to species
  meta_sp <- metadata %>% filter(species == species_name)
  
  # organ viability, >=3 per side
  organ_counts <- meta_sp %>%
    group_by(organ_normalized, side) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(organ_normalized) %>%
    filter(n_distinct(side) == 2, all(n >= 6))
  
  if (nrow(organ_counts) == 0) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Filter to viable organs
  viable_organs <- unique(organ_counts$organ_normalized)
  meta_sp <- meta_sp %>% filter(organ_normalized %in% viable_organs)
  
  return(meta_sp)
}

```

```{r}
# design formula

build_design <- function(metadata_sp) {
  
  sex_counts <- table(metadata_sp$sex)
  use_sex <- length(sex_counts) >= 2 && all(sex_counts >= 3)
  
  # age check 
  age_vals <- metadata_sp$age_weeks[!is.na(metadata_sp$age_weeks)]
  use_age  <- length(age_vals) >= 10 && 
              length(unique(age_vals)) >= 5
  
  # Add read length check
  readlength_counts <- table(droplevels(as.factor(metadata_sp$maxreadlength)))
  use_readlength <- length(readlength_counts) >= 2 && 
                    all(readlength_counts >= 3)
  
  design_terms <- "side"
  if (use_age)       design_terms <- c("age_weeks",     design_terms)
  if (use_sex)       design_terms <- c("sex",           design_terms)
  if (use_readlength) design_terms <- c("maxreadlength", design_terms)
  
  design_formula <- as.formula(paste("~", paste(design_terms, collapse = " + ")))
  
  return(list(formula    = design_formula, 
              use_sex    = use_sex, 
              use_age    = use_age,
              use_readlength = use_readlength))
}
```


```{r DESeq2 object}

create_dds <- function(metadata_sp, txi_data, design_formula) {
  
  # Get sample IDs
  samples <- metadata_sp$libraryid
  rownames(metadata_sp) <- metadata_sp$libraryid
  
  # Create object
  dds <- DESeqDataSetFromTximport(
    txi = list(
      counts = txi_data$counts[, samples],
      abundance = txi_data$abundance[, samples],
      length = txi_data$length[, samples],
      countsFromAbundance = txi_data$countsFromAbundance
    ),
    colData = metadata_sp,
    design = design_formula
  )
  
  return(dds)
}

```


```{r Run DESeq2}

run_deseq <- function(dds) {
  keep <- rowSums(counts(dds)) >= 10
  dds <- dds[keep, ]
  dds <- DESeq(dds)
  # dds <- nbinomWaldTest(dds, maxit = 500)
  return(dds)
}

```


```{r results}

extract_results <- function(dds, species_name, organ_name, use_sex, use_age) {
  
  results_list <- list()
  
  # if side in model
  # res_side <- results(dds, name = "side_R_vs_L")
  res_side <- lfcShrink(dds, coef = "side_R_vs_L", type = "apeglm")
  n_sig <- sum(res_side$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  results_list[["side"]] <- as.data.frame(res_side) %>%
    mutate(gene = rownames(res_side),
           variable = "side",
           species = species_name,
           organ = organ_name) %>%
    dplyr::select(species, organ, variable, gene, log2FoldChange, pvalue, padj)
  
  # if age in model
  if (use_age) {
    # res_age <- results(dds, name = "age_weeks")
    res_age <- lfcShrink(dds, coef = "age_weeks", type = "apeglm")
    n_sig <- sum(res_age$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)

    results_list[["age"]] <- as.data.frame(res_age) %>%
      mutate(gene = rownames(res_age),
             variable = "age",
             species = species_name,
             organ = organ_name) %>% 
      dplyr::select(species, organ, variable, gene, log2FoldChange, pvalue, padj)
  }
  
  # if sex in model
  if (use_sex) {
    res_sex <- results(dds, name = "sex_male_vs_female")
    n_sig <- sum(res_sex$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
    cat("  Sex:", n_sig, "significant genes\n")
    
    results_list[["sex"]] <- as.data.frame(res_sex) %>%
      mutate(gene = rownames(res_sex),
             variable = "sex",
             species = species_name,
             organ = organ_name) %>%
      dplyr::select(species, organ, variable, gene, log2FoldChange, pvalue, padj)
  }
  
  return(results_list)
}

```

```{r analysis - mouse}

meta_mouse <- prepare_metadata(metadata, "Mus_musculus")

print(table(meta_mouse$organ_normalized))

organs <- unique(meta_mouse$organ_normalized)
results_mouse <- list()

# loop over organs
for (organ in organs) {
  
  meta_mouse_organ <- meta_mouse[meta_mouse$organ_normalized == organ, ]
  design_mouse <- build_design(meta_mouse_organ)
  
  cat("Organ:", organ, "\n")
  cat("Design:", as.character(design_mouse$formula), "\n")
  
  dds_mouse <- create_dds(meta_mouse_organ, txi_mouse, design_mouse$formula)
  dds_mouse <- run_deseq(dds_mouse)
  results_mouse[[organ]] <- extract_results(dds_mouse, "Mus_musculus", organ,
                                            design_mouse$use_sex, design_mouse$use_age)
}


# results from all organs
results_mouse <- bind_rows(lapply(results_mouse, bind_rows))

saveRDS(results_mouse, "results_mouse.rds")

```

```{r analysis - pig}

# Prepare metadata
meta_pig <- prepare_metadata(metadata, "Sus_scrofa")%>% 
  filter(protocol != "miRNA")

print(table(meta_pig$organ_normalized, meta_pig$side))

# Loop over organs
organs_pig <- unique(meta_pig$organ_normalized)
results_pig <- list()

for (organ in organs_pig) {
  
  meta_pig_organ <- meta_pig[meta_pig$organ_normalized == organ, ]
  
  nrow(meta_pig_organ)
  print(table(meta_pig_organ$side))
  design_pig <- build_design(meta_pig_organ)
  
  cat("Organ:", organ, "\n")
  cat("Design:", as.character(design_pig$formula), "\n")
  
  dds_pig <- create_dds(meta_pig_organ, txi_pig, design_pig$formula)
  dds_pig <- run_deseq(dds_pig)
  results_pig[[organ]] <- extract_results(dds_pig, "Sus_scrofa", organ,
                                          design_pig$use_sex, design_pig$use_age)
}

# results from all organs
results_pig <- bind_rows(lapply(results_pig, bind_rows))

saveRDS(results_pig, "results_pig.rds")
write.csv(results_pig, "results_pig.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r sheep analysis}

# # Prepare metadata
# meta_sheep <- prepare_metadata(metadata, "Ovis_aries")
# 
# print(table(meta_sheep$organ_normalized, meta_sheep$side))
# 
# # Loop over organs
# organs_sheep <- unique(meta_sheep$organ_normalized)
# results_sheep <- list()
# 
# txi_sheep <- readRDS("/Users/mnyamari/Desktop/GTEx/variance-decomp/txi_sheep.rds")
# 
# for (organ in organs_sheep) {
#   
#   meta_sheep_organ <- meta_sheep[meta_sheep$organ_normalized == organ, ]
#   print(table(meta_sheep_organ$side))
#   
#   design_sheep <- build_design(meta_sheep_organ)
#   dds_sheep <- create_dds(meta_sheep_organ, txi_sheep, design_sheep$formula)
#   dds_sheep <- run_deseq(dds_sheep)
#   results_sheep[[organ]] <- extract_results(dds_sheep, "Ovis_aries", organ,
#                                             design_sheep$use_sex, design_sheep$use_age)
# }
# 
# # results from all organs
# results_sheep <- bind_rows(lapply(results_sheep, bind_rows))
# 
# # Save
# saveRDS(results_sheep, "results_sheep.rds")
# write.csv(results_sheep, "results_sheep.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r combine all results}

all_results <- bind_rows(
  results_mouse,
  results_pig
)

saveRDS(all_results, "all_species_deseq_results.rds")

write.csv(all_results, "all_species_deseq_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```
